candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; equals Net sales in the preview and is a standard revenue line.
Also a valid top-line sales label; identical to Total Revenue in the preview and may be the primary operating revenue label.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list for possible label changes over time; do not sum.

candidates.why: This appears to be the direct production/service cost line and best matches cost of goods sold/cost of sales.

variables.notes: Candidate list for COGS was empty, so selected from full A-column preview. 'Materials and purchased services' is the clearest direct-cost/COGS analogue.

candidates.why: Overhead-type operating expense bucket; suitable SG&A component and not a total.
Personnel costs are a standard SG&A/overhead component when no explicit SG&A total is shown.
Headcount metric, not an expense line, so not appropriate for SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row is present, so selected the best overhead component rows and excluded COGS and D&A.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance-sheet accumulated amortization line, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance-sheet gross capitalized R&D asset line, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: No income-statement R&D expense line is visible. Balance-sheet R&D asset lines should not be used for XRD expense.

candidates.why: Most explicit interest expense label available, despite being tagged as a balancing value.
Finance-expense line that may capture interest expense where explicit interest is not reported.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest expense, but only a supplemental lease-specific component and not full company interest expense.
Balancing line for financial expenses; less direct than explicit interest expense or other financial expenses.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Using a priority list for changing labels over time; later code should take the first non-missing value, not sum.

candidates.why: Best available equity line on the balance sheet; no parent-only equity line is visible.
Duplicate capitalization variant of the same balance-sheet equity concept; useful as fallback if label changes by year.
Balancing line, not an equity measure to use when an actual equity row exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is visible, so using total equity as BE priority list. To avoid double counting, MIB is set to empty.

candidates.why: Income-statement allocation/comprehensive income item, not a balance-sheet minority interest line.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income-statement subtotal, not balance-sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: No balance-sheet non-controlling interest/minority interest line is visible. Since BE uses total equity, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
